ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "active_student" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is currently active */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the program */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program (e.g., 4 years) */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree awarded (e.g., Bachelor, Master) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Description of admission requirements for the program */,
  "program_coordinator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member coordinating the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_coordinator_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_coordinator_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the department */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the department was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member was hired */,
  "position" TEXT /* Specific position within the faculty */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the faculty member's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., CS101) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the course content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being taken */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the student is enrolled */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the student is enrolled */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the student withdrew from the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_semester FOREIGN KEY ("semester") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marks" (
  "mark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mark record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment for which the marks are recorded */,
  "subject_1_marks" INTEGER /* Marks received in Subject 1 */,
  "subject_2_marks" INTEGER /* Marks received in Subject 2 */,
  "subject_3_marks" INTEGER /* Marks received in Subject 3 */,
  "subject_4_marks" INTEGER /* Marks received in Subject 4 */,
  "subject_5_marks" INTEGER /* Marks received in Subject 5 */,
  "final_mark" INTEGER /* Final mark for the course */,
  "midterm_mark" INTEGER /* Marks received in the midterm exam */,
  "final_exam_mark" INTEGER /* Marks received in the final exam */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of classes attended by the student */,
  "project_marks" INTEGER /* Marks received for projects */,
  "assignment_marks" INTEGER /* Marks received for assignments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marks_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "semester_type" TEXT /* Type of the semester (e.g., regular, summer) */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* The academic year to which the semester belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., student records, course information) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
